Name.zh-CN: 华约增强模组(临时版本)

Description.en-US:
Pact Increased Lethality is specifically designed to bolster the firepower and survivability of Warsaw Pact forces. It introduces a wide array of advanced vehicle variants, modern defensive systems, and upgraded ammunition to bring Eastern Bloc armor to a new level of lethality.
Including: multiple types of ERA, improved composite armor, Super FCS (Sosna-U) and guidance tweaks for T‑72 variants (with some T‑72M automatically upgraded to T‑72M1); enhanced protection and fire control for modern T‑80BV/U; BDD add‑on composite armor, Drozd APS, better stabilizers, laser rangefinders, improved HEAT rounds and 9M117 gun‑launched missiles, plus stronger engines and drivetrains for T‑55/T‑62/T‑64A; an added AGS‑17D coaxial automatic grenade launcher for BMP‑1; higher‑penetration and better‑ballistic 30 mm ammo plus 9M113AS top‑attack and 9M133 Kornet missiles for BMP‑2; and a stabilizer plus an optional 30 mm 2A72 turret “BTR‑60A” refit for BTR‑60 that grants BMP‑2‑level ammo and day/night sights, all significantly boosting survivability and firepower without breaking overall faction balance.
Priority update version by RoyZ
Description.zh-CN:
华约增强模组是一款专门用于提升华约阵营的火力与生存能力。该模组引入了大量先进的载具变体、现代防御系统以及升级后的弹药，旨在将东欧集团的装甲力量提升至全新的杀伤水平。
为 T‑72 系列增加多型反应装甲、改良复合装甲、松树-U火控与导引修正等，并自动将部分 T‑72M 升级为 T‑72M1；为 T‑80BV/U等现代坦克强化防护与火控；为 T‑55/T‑62/T‑64A 增加 BDD 复合加装装甲、Drozd 主动防护系统、更稳的稳定器、激光测距仪、改良 HEAT 弹与 9M117 等炮射导弹，以及更强的发动机与传动系统；为 BMP‑1 增加 AGS‑17D 同轴自动榴弹发射器，为 BMP‑2 增加更高穿深与更好弹道的 30 毫米弹种及 9M113AS 顶攻导弹和 9M133“短号”导弹；为 BTR‑60 增加稳定器并可改装为装有 30 毫米 2A72 炮塔的 BTR‑60A，获得与 BMP‑2 相同的高性能弹药和昼夜瞄具，显著提升多型华约载具的生存性与打击能力。
由RoyZ维护的优先更新版以支持最新游戏

Description.en-US:
Pact Increased Lethality is specifically designed to bolster the firepower and survivability of Warsaw Pact forces. It introduces a wide array of advanced vehicle variants, modern defensive systems, and upgraded ammunition to bring Eastern Bloc armor to a new level of lethality.
Including: multiple types of ERA, improved composite armor, Super FCS (Sosna-U) and guidance tweaks for T‑72 variants (with some T‑72M automatically upgraded to T‑72M1); enhanced protection and fire control for modern T‑80BV/U; BDD add‑on composite armor, Drozd APS, better stabilizers, laser rangefinders, improved HEAT rounds and 9M117 gun‑launched missiles, plus stronger engines and drivetrains for T‑55/T‑62/T‑64A; an added AGS‑17D coaxial automatic grenade launcher for BMP‑1; higher‑penetration and better‑ballistic 30 mm ammo plus 9M113AS top‑attack and 9M133 Kornet missiles for BMP‑2; and a stabilizer plus an optional 30 mm 2A72 turret “BTR‑60A” refit for BTR‑60 that grants BMP‑2‑level ammo and day/night sights, all significantly boosting survivability and firepower without breaking overall faction balance.
Description.zh-CN:
华约增强模组是一款专门用于提升华约阵营的火力与生存能力。该模组引入了大量先进的载具变体、现代防御系统以及升级后的弹药，旨在将东欧集团的装甲力量提升至全新的杀伤水平。
为 T‑72 系列增加多型反应装甲、改良复合装甲、松树-U火控与导引修正等，并自动将部分 T‑72M 升级为 T‑72M1；为 T‑80BV/U等现代坦克强化防护与火控；为 T‑55/T‑62/T‑64A 增加 BDD 复合加装装甲、Drozd 主动防护系统、更稳的稳定器、激光测距仪、改良 HEAT 弹与 9M117 等炮射导弹，以及更强的发动机与传动系统；为 BMP‑1 增加 AGS‑17D 同轴自动榴弹发射器，为 BMP‑2 增加更高穿深与更好弹道的 30 毫米弹种及 9M113AS 顶攻导弹和 9M133“短号”导弹；为 BTR‑60 增加稳定器并可改装为装有 30 毫米 2A72 炮塔的 BTR‑60A，获得与 BMP‑2 相同的高性能弹药和昼夜瞄具，显著提升多型华约载具的生存性与打击能力。

Description.en-US: The M1A1 Abrams mod introduces the iconic US main battle tank M1A1, that converts all in‑game M1IPs into M1A1s fitted with the 120mm M256 and a default ammo load of M829 APFSDS‑T (22 rounds) plus M830 HEAT‑MP‑T (18 rounds with a shoulder fuze); it also adds config‑driven options such as alternate APFSDS rounds (M827, M829A1, M829A2), an alternate HEAT round (M830A1 with a proximity fuse toggleable via middle mouse), per‑vehicle customization of how many M829/M830 rounds are carried, and several advanced features disabled by default (non‑IP M1 → M1E1 conversion, randomized M1A1/E1 conversions, horizontal sight stabilization when applying lead, commander CITV, depleted‑uranium cheek armor for M1A1s, M153 CROWS, and different gunner thermal settings), plus preset conversion “profiles” mapping feature toggles to variants like M1A1HA/HC, M1A2, and M1A2 SEP (e.g., DU armor generation, azimuth rotation, CITV, higher‑gen FLIR or CROWS)..
Description.zh-CN: M1A1模组为游戏加入了标志性的美军主战坦克 M1A1，把游戏内所有 M1IP 统一转换为配备 120mm M256 主炮的 M1A1，并默认装填 M829 APFSDS‑T（22 发）与 M830 HEAT‑MP‑T（18 发、带触发引信）；同时在模组配置里提供可选功能与细节定制，包括可切换的备用穿甲弹（M827、M829A1、M829A2）、备用破甲弹（M830A1，带可用鼠标中键开关的近炸/距离引信）、自定义每辆车携行的 M829/M830 数量，以及一系列默认关闭的“高级改装”选项：将非 IP 的 M1 转换为 M1E1、随机化 M1A1/E1 转换、在提前量修正时启用水平视线稳定、加入车长 CITV、为 M1A1 添加贫铀“脸颊”装甲、加装 M153 CROWS、以及不同的炮手热像设置；此外它还用不同开关组合来对应多种衍生型转换（如 M1A1HA/HC 的贫铀装甲代次、M1A2 的炮塔方位旋转与 CITV、M1A2 SEP 的更高代次 FLIR 或 CROWS 等）。

Description.en-US:
This mod adds a fully configurable “Abrams Modernization Package” for M1-series vehicles (centered on the M1A1/M1E1): it introduces the XM1147 AMP-T multi‑purpose programmable round and a broad set of selectable ammo options (up to four ammo slots, 50 total rounds; default loadouts include M829A4/M830A2/XM1147/LAHAT), plus a 120mm M256 main gun with a new model and detailed fuzing/proximity logic for rounds like XM1147 and M830A1, including modeled anti‑ERA/tandem interactions; it also adds multiple switchable armor variants (Base/HA/HC/SA/HU, etc.) with corresponding weight changes, optional CITV, enhanced optics/FLIR/GAS, crew proficiency tuning, smoke-system upgrades, an APU, and hardware options like M153 CROWS II and a coax upgrade; finally, it offers extensive vehicle-dynamics tweaks (engine choices, upgraded 6F/3R transmission, suspension, tracks, governor delete for higher top speed, stability control).
[THIS MOD IS NOT WORKING ON 20260319.1]
Description.zh-CN:
该模组为 M1 系列（以 M1A1/M1E1 为核心）加入“AMP（XM1147）多用途可编程弹”等一整套可配置升级：提供带新模型的 120mm M256 主炮、可选多种弹药并自定义装填（最多 4 个弹种槽位、总备弹上限 50，默认含 M829A4/M830A2/XM1147/LAHAT），实现 XM1147 的多引信/近炸与 M830A1 等弹种逻辑，并加入对反应装甲/双战斗部等“抗 ERA”效果的建模；同时提供可切换的多套“装甲变体”（基础/HA/HC/SA/HU 等）与随之变化的车重，配套可选 CITV、改进光学与热像、车组熟练度、烟幕系统升级、APU、以及 M153 CROWS II、同轴机枪升级等外观与火控附件；在机动方面还能选择发动机、增强变速箱（6 前进 3 倒档）、悬挂、履带、解除限速器、稳定控制等，使整车的防护、火力、感知与机动都能按偏好组合。
[此模组在20260319.1版本无效]

Description.en-US: Underdogs Enhanced is a MelonLoader mod for equips underdog vehicles like BMP-1, Marder 1A2, BRDM-2, BTR-70, Leopard 1 series, and PT-76B with vector stabilizers, laser rangefinders, faster turret traverse, and improved gunner sights—bringing new life to vintage armor.
Description.zh-CN: 弱势载具增强模组，通过为 BMP-1、Marder 1A2、BRDM-2、BTR-70、Leopard 1 系列和 PT-76B 等载具添加矢量稳定器、激光测距仪、转塔转速提升和瞄具变焦等功能，大幅提升这些"弱势"载具的作战能力，让老式装备焕发新生。

Description.en-US: Give BMP-1/1P stabilizer
Description.zh-CN: 给予BMP-1/1P双稳

Description.en-US: Super M60 is a WIP mod upgrading M60A1/A3 to hypothetical M60A4 standard, boosting armor (KE+60%, CE+80%), 1250HP engine, ammo (e.g., M900A1/2 APFSDS-T pen 550-580mm), Cupola HMG with LRF/stabilization, and optional elite crew. M60A3 adds GPS/FLIR; M60A1 keeps manual rangefinder but improved optics. Note: Cupola LRF works only on M60A3; full turret/hull armor due to model limits.Priority update version by RoyZ
Description.zh-CN: 超级M60是一款将 M60A1 和 M60A3 升级为假想 M60A4 标准的模组，目前处于开发中（WIP）。它提升了装甲（KE+60%、CE+80%）、1250马力发动机、弹药性能（如 M900A1/2 APFSDS-T 穿深550-580mm）、Cupola 机枪 LRF/稳定系统，以及可选精英乘员。M60A3 获GPS/FLIR，M60A1 保留手动测距但改善光学；注意 Cupola LRF 仅 M60A3 有效，全塔/车体装甲强化为模型限制。由RoyZ维护的优先更新版以支持最新游戏

Description.en-US: Super M60 is a WIP mod upgrading M60A1/A3 to hypothetical M60A4 standard, boosting armor (KE+60%, CE+80%), 1250HP engine, ammo (e.g., M900A1/2 APFSDS-T pen 550-580mm), Cupola HMG with LRF/stabilization, and optional elite crew. M60A3 adds GPS/FLIR; M60A1 keeps manual rangefinder but improved optics. Note: Cupola LRF works only on M60A3; full turret/hull armor due to model limits.
Description.zh-CN: 超级M60是一款将 M60A1 和 M60A3 升级为假想 M60A4 标准的模组，目前处于开发中（WIP）。它提升了装甲（KE+60%、CE+80%）、1250马力发动机、弹药性能（如 M900A1/2 APFSDS-T 穿深550-580mm）、Cupola 机枪 LRF/稳定系统，以及可选精英乘员。M60A3 获GPS/FLIR，M60A1 保留手动测距但改善光学；注意 Cupola LRF 仅 M60A3 有效，全塔/车体装甲强化为模型限制。

Description.en-US:
M2BradleyExtended is a mod that expands the M2 Bradley with additional variants and upgrades. It is still unfinished, but already playable.  
Current content includes several conversions and equipment upgrades, such as the M2A1 with TOW-2/TOW-2A, the M2A2with an add-on armor package, the M2A2 ODSwith a laser rangefinder, and the M2A2 ODS-SAwith the IBASsystem.  
Planned features include CITV, IBASautotracking, and a 50mm Bradley variant.
Description.zh-CN:
M2BradleyExtended 是一个为 M2 Bradley 扩展更多型号与功能的模组，目前仍在开发中，但已经可以游玩。  
当前内容包括多种改型与升级方案，如 M2A1的 TOW-2/TOW-2A配置、M2A2的附加装甲包、M2A2 ODS的激光测距仪，以及 M2A2 ODS-SA的 IBAS系统。  
后续计划加入 CITV、IBAS自动跟踪，以及50mmBradley 版本。

Name.zh-CN: M6A2 "阿达茨"布雷德利(优先更新版)

Description.en-US:
M6A2 ADATS is a mod that replaces the M2 Bradley with a hypothetical M6A1/A2/A3 ADATS anti-air/anti-tank vehicle, featuring the GAU-12/U rotary cannon (3600 RPM, 1500 rounds) or 30mm XM813 chaingun, plus MIM-146 ADATS missiles (4 ready, 12 stowed), with auto lead calculation, horizontal stabilized reticle, and diverse ammo types including airburst and tandem warhead options.
Priority update version by RoyZ
Description.zh-CN:
M6A2 "阿达茨"布雷德利是一款将 M2 布雷德利 替换为假想 M6A1/A2/A3 ADATS 防空/反坦克载具的模组，配备 GAU-12/U 旋转炮（3600 RPM，1500 发弹药）或 30mm XM813 机炮，以及 MIM-146 ADATS 导弹（4 发就绪，12 发备用），支持自动提前量计算、水平稳定瞄具和多种弹药选项，包括空爆弹药和串联战斗部。
由RoyZ维护的优先更新版以支持最新游戏

Description.en-US: M6A2 ADATS is a mod that replaces the M2 Bradley with a hypothetical M6A1/A2/A3 ADATS anti-air/anti-tank vehicle, featuring the GAU-12/U rotary cannon (3600 RPM, 1500 rounds) or 30mm XM813 chaingun, plus MIM-146 ADATS missiles (4 ready, 12 stowed), with auto lead calculation, horizontal stabilized reticle, and diverse ammo types including airburst and tandem warhead options.
Description.zh-CN: M6A2 "阿达茨"布雷德利是一款将 M2 布雷德利 替换为假想 M6A1/A2/A3 ADATS 防空/反坦克载具的模组，配备 GAU-12/U 旋转炮（3600 RPM，1500 发弹药）或 30mm XM813 机炮，以及 MIM-146 ADATS 导弹（4 发就绪，12 发备用），支持自动提前量计算、水平稳定瞄具和多种弹药选项，包括空爆弹药和串联战斗部。

Description.en-US: M3A2 Bradley mod replaces all M2 Bradleys with upgraded M3A3 Bradleys, featuring TOW2-A missiles, M919 APFSDS rounds, and expanded ammo options for superior firepower and survivability.
Description.zh-CN: M3A2 超级布雷德利模组将所有 M2 Bradley 替换为更先进的 M3A3 Bradley 版本，新增 TOW2-A 导弹、M919 穿甲弹以及更多弹药类型，提升火力和生存能力。

Description.en-US:
50mm Bradley is a super up-gunned Bradley IFV featuring the M913 50mm autocannon (40x M1023 APFSDS-T, 120x M1024 HEAB-T with airburst capability) paired with 10x BGM-71C I-TOW-FF fire-and-forget top-attack missiles (laser designation lock), built to deal with those East Germans on your doorstep.
Priority update version by RoyZ
Description.zh-CN:
50毫米布雷德利是一款超级武装布莱德利步兵战车，配备 M913 50mm 自动炮（含 M1023 APFSDS-T 40 发、M1024 HEAB-T 120 发，支持空爆功能），搭配 BGM-71C I-TOW-FF 射后不理式顶攻导弹（10 发，激光指示锁定），专为对抗东德装甲部队而设计，让你在家门口就能压制敌方火力。
由RoyZ维护的优先更新版以支持最新游戏

Description.en-US: 50mm Bradley is a super up-gunned Bradley IFV featuring the M913 50mm autocannon (40x M1023 APFSDS-T, 120x M1024 HEAB-T with airburst capability) paired with 10x BGM-71C I-TOW-FF fire-and-forget top-attack missiles (laser designation lock), built to deal with those East Germans on your doorstep.
Description.zh-CN: 50毫米布雷德利是一款超级武装布莱德利步兵战车，配备 M913 50mm 自动炮（含 M1023 APFSDS-T 40 发、M1024 HEAB-T 120 发，支持空爆功能），搭配 BGM-71C I-TOW-FF 射后不理式顶攻导弹（10 发，激光指示锁定），专为对抗东德装甲部队而设计，让你在家门口就能压制敌方火力。

Description.en-US: This equips the M113 with the M220 launcher system and 10 BGM-71A TOW missiles, featuring longer reload times than TOW emplacements; the launcher lacks stabilization and thermal sights by default, with a 40% default appearance chance.
Description.zh-CN: 为M113步兵战车配备M220发射系统和10枚BGM-71A TOW导弹，重新装填时间长于固定TOW阵地；发射器默认无稳定功能，默认无热成像瞄具，默认40%出现概率。

Description.en-US: NATO ERA adds configurable Explosive Reactive Armor (ERA) to M1/IP Abrams and M2 Bradley, with customizable arrangement, performance, color (to match custom skins), and optional weight penalty. Compatible with vanilla Abrams, M1A1 Abrams v1.1.4+, M1A1 Abrams AMP v2.3.3+, 50mm Bradley, M3A2 Bradley, and M6A2 ADATS mods; only models ARAT-1, BRAT M3, and M5 bricks for performance optimization (no triangular M4 bricks). Special thanks to thebeninator for coding and 3D modeling advice; contact author for custom texture model files, ARAT-1 weighs 29.48KG per tile (rounded).[THIS MOD IS NOT WORKING ON 20260319.1]
Description.zh-CN: 北约爆反为 M1/IP Abrams 和 M2 Bradley 添加可配置的爆炸反应装甲（ERA），支持自定义排列、性能、颜色（适配自定义皮肤）和可选重量惩罚。兼容原版 Abrams、M1A1 Abrams v1.1.4+、M1A1 Abrams AMP v2.3.3+、50mm Bradley、M3A2 Bradley 和 M6A2 ADATS 模组，仅建模 ARAT-1、BRAT M3 和 M5 砖块以优化性能（未包含三角形 M4 砖块）。特别感谢 thebeninator 提供的编码和 3D 建模指导；如需自定义纹理模型文件可联系作者，ARAT-1 每块重 29.48KG（四舍五入）。[此模组在20260319.1版本无效]

Description.en-US: This mod overhauls the various German Leopard 1 variants in-game to represent Canadian Leopard C1s serving with the 4th Canadian Mechanized Brigade Group at CFB Lahr. It features an approximation of the SABCA Cobelda fire control system, including laser rangefinding and automatic lead calculation, enforces use of the PZB-200 night sight, replaces the MG3 with the C6 machine gun, and swaps German markings and crew voices for Canadian-style visual details and English audio. The mod also includes multiple ammunition and cosmetic options, allowing players to choose between historical Canadian, American, or default German loadouts, along with alternate paint schemes, camouflage settings, callsigns, maple leaf markings, tactical symbols, and load classification numbers for a more authentic Cold War-era Canadian Leopard C1 presentation.
Description.zh-CN: 本模组将游戏中的各型德制 Leopard 1 主战坦克全面重制为驻扎于拉尔加拿大空军基地、隶属加拿大第4机械化旅群的加拿大 Leopard C1。内容包括以 SABCA Cobelda 火控系统为蓝本的瞄准设备、激光测距与自动提前量计算、强制使用 PZB-200 夜视仪、将 MG3 更换为 C6 机枪，以及替换涂装、编号、战术标识与英文车组语音。模组还提供多种弹药与外观选项，包括更贴近加拿大陆军历史编制的弹种搭配、不同车体底色、三色迷彩开关，以及枫叶、呼号、战术符号和载重等级标识等细节调整，力求还原冷战时期加拿大装甲部队的 Leopard C1 风貌。

Description.en-US:
This mod replaces the weapon sounds of most in-game vehicles.This mod is still in the testing stage, so minor bugs may occur. 
To resolve compatibility issues, this sound mod has been exported using a new encoding method, which has significantly increased its file size (from 20MB to 140MB)
Check more info at https://discord.com/channels/500496986865139712/1463838278603243593
Description.zh-CN: 通过替换文件的方式进行游戏音效替换，参见：https://www.bilibili.com/video/BV1MyzHBgEaY/，注意此文件较大（20MB提升至140MB），且在游戏更新或检查完整性后可能需要重新安装

Description.en-US: Replace M2 Bradley Sound
Description.zh-CN: 替换M2布雷德利的音效

Description.en-US:
Overview

VoiceChanger is a GHPC mod that lets each vehicle use either a built-in voice protocol or a custom voice pack.
The mod automatically checks the player’s current vehicle and applies the matching voice setting from the config.

Description

It supports two main modes: switching a vehicle to one of the built-in protocols, Russian, German, or American, or assigning a custom voice pack folder by name.
Custom voice packs are placed in Mods/VoiceChanger/, and the mod matches .wav or .ogg files by action name, with optional state folders such as regular, combat, panicked, and calm.

Config Notes

All vehicle voice settings are managed through the [GHPCVoiceChanger] section in UserData/MelonPreferences.cfg, which is also consistent with how GHPC MelonLoader mods commonly store configurable options.

For example, M1 = "American" makes the M1 use the built-in American protocol, while M1 = "MyVoicePack" makes it use a custom pack named MyVoicePack.
Each vehicle also has a VehicleName_MixedVoicelines option, such as M1_MixedVoicelines = true.

Voice Behavior

When MixedVoicelines is set to true, any missing custom lines will fall back to the vanilla voice lines.
When it is set to false, only custom lines will play, and missing lines will remain silent.
You can also provide multiple variations for one action, such as ontheway.wav, ontheway_1.wav, and ontheway_2.wav, and the mod will choose one at random.

Notes

The mod refreshes the active voice setup when the scene initializes or when the player changes vehicle.
If a vehicle key in the config is not recognized, that replacement will be skipped.
For vehicles that do not use a custom pack, the mod switches their voice protocol to the configured Russian, German, or American crew style.
Description.zh-CN:
VoiceChanger 是一个用于 GHPC 的车组语音替换模组，可为不同载具切换内置语音协议，或加载自定义语音包。
模组会根据当前玩家所操控的载具，自动读取配置并应用对应语音设置。
内容说明
模组支持两种用法：一种是把载具语音切换为 Russian、German、American 这三种内置语音协议，另一种是指定一个自定义语音包文件夹名称来播放自定义语音。
自定义语音包放在 Mods/VoiceChanger/ 下，模组会按语音动作名称匹配 .wav 或 .ogg 文件，并支持 regular、combat、panicked、calm 等状态子文件夹。

配置说明
所有载具语音设置都通过配置段管理
例如 M1 = "American" 表示 M1 使用美式内置语音，M1 = "MyVoicePack" 表示 M1 使用名为 MyVoicePack 的自定义语音包。
每台载具还带有一个 载具名_MixedVoicelines 开关，例如 M1_MixedVoicelines = true。

语音规则
当 混合语音 启用时 时，未被自定义语音包覆盖的语音会回退到原版语音。
当 混合语音 未启用，只播放自定义语音，缺失的语音不会自动补原版。
同一动作可以放入多个同名变体文件，例如 ontheway.wav、ontheway_1.wav、ontheway_2.wav，播放时会随机选取。

补充说明
模组会在切换玩家载具或场景初始化后自动刷新当前生效的语音配置。
如果配置中的载具键名无法识别，模组不会应用对应替换，并会跳过该载具。
对于未使用自定义语音包的载具，模组会按配置把其语音协议改为俄语、德语或美语对应的车组流程。

Description.en-US:
Choose between any of the 6 in-game battle music tracks in GHPC to play all the time, or play your own music in Gunner HEAT PC!
Due to how Broken Arrow and Not One Step Back are accessed by the game, if you want to play them, you need to download the zip from the github
Bin/
├── Mods/
│   ├── GHPC_Music_Controller.dll
│   └── Music_Controller_Assets/
│       └── Broken Arrow_L1.ogg
└── GHPC.Exe
Description.zh-CN:
在 GHPC 中选择任意 6 首游戏内战斗音乐曲目持续播放，或者在 Gunner HEAT PC 中播放你自己的音乐！
于游戏访问《Broken Arrow》和《Not One Step Back》的方式，这两个曲子需要从github下载资源包并放置
Bin/
├── Mods/
│   ├── GHPC_Music_Controller.dll
│   └── Music_Controller_Assets/
│       └── Broken Arrow_L1.ogg
└── GHPC.Exe

Description.en-US: This mod firstly forces the commander to designate the desired ammunition instead of whatever is currently loaded when using "manual" or "doctrinal" loading, for both Soviet and East German crews. Secondly, the mod moves the "Schuß" voice line spoken by East-German tank commanders to the gunner, which was the callout the gunner made when firing (subtitled as "on the way!") and not a command to fire. The associated subtitles are modified to correspond logically. Bundeswehr gunners still call out "achtung" when firing. Commanders of both armies always say "feuer" and never "Schuß" as the executive command.
Description.zh-CN:
这个模组首先会强制车长在使用“手动”或“条令”装填时，先明确指定所需弹种，而不是默认装填当前已经装上的弹药；这一改动同时适用于苏军和东德车组。
其次，该模组将东德坦克车长所说的“Schuß”语音移交给炮手，因为这句话本来就是炮手在开火时的报话（字幕可理解为“出膛！”或“发射！”），而不是下达开火命令。与之对应的字幕也做了调整，使逻辑更加合理。联邦德国国防军的炮手在开火时仍然会喊“achtung”。两支军队的车长都会始终使用“feuer”作为最终开火命令，而不会说“Schuß”。

Description.en-US: A comprehensive weather control mod for Gunner, HEAT, PC! that allows real-time manipulation of weather conditions, sky lighting, and dynamic weather systems.Support always sunny options.
Description.zh-CN: 为 GHPC开发的综合天气控制模组，支持实时调整天气状况、天空光照和动态天气系统。支持永远晴天选项。

Description.en-US: Toggle Fire Rate for M2/BMP2, press B to switch.
Description.zh-CN: M2/BMP2射速切换,B键生效。

Name.zh-CN: 车长超控瞄准放大限制解除

Description.en-US: Allows turret traversal while using binoculars,can be configured to allow shooting while using binoculars (disabled by default)
Description.zh-CN: 允许在使用双筒望远镜时进行炮塔转动，可配置为允许在使用双筒望远镜时射击（默认禁用）

Description.en-US: This mod applies a runtime patch (using Harmony) to the game's internal LoadoutManager logic, significantly reducing the wait time for player weapon resupply and making the pace of battle more fluid. By default, it reduces the resupply time to just 50 milliseconds (0.05 seconds). This applies only to players and does not affect AI units.
Description.zh-CN: 该模组通过对游戏内部 LoadoutManager 逻辑进行运行时补丁（使用 Harmony），大幅缩短玩家武器补给的等待时间，让战场节奏更加流畅。 默认将补给时间压缩至仅 50 毫秒（0.05 秒），仅对玩家生效，不影响 AI 单位

Description.en-US:
A MelonLoader mod allows players to customize ammo loadout distribution across ammo racks.

Features
Ammo Rack Editor: Customize the distribution of each ammo type across different ammo racks
Autocannon Feed Support: Adjust the composition of loaded ammo belts for autocannon weapons
Chambered Ammo Selection: Choose which ammo type is loaded in the chamber
Dual Language Support: English and Chinese UI
Total Ammo Limit Option: Limit editable ammo to the vehicle's current total (free distribution under fixed total)
Preset System: Save and load ammo configurations for each vehicle

How to Use
Enter any vehicle with weapons
The loadout editor window will appear automatically ONCE
Adjust ammo distribution using sliders:
Set the count for each ammo type in each rack
Use "Fill" button to fill a rack with one ammo type exclusively
Use "Clear" button to remove all ammo of that type from the rack
Select chambered ammo type at the bottom
Click "Apply" to save changes

Notes for Autocannon Vehicles
Rack 0 represents the ready-to-fire ammo on the feed (ammo box)
For autocannon vehicles, Rack 0 is hidden by default since it's not a standard ammo rack
You can adjust the loaded belt composition in the "Loaded Ammo" section
The total loaded rounds are fixed - adjusting one ammo type will rebalance others

Using Presets

Configure your desired ammo distribution
Enter a name in the preset text field and click "Save" to save the current configuration
Use the dropdown to select a previously saved preset
Click "Load" to apply the selected preset
Click "Delete" to remove the selected preset
Presets are saved per vehicle type in `UserData/GHPCLoadout/`.
Description.zh-CN:
允许玩家自定义弹药架上的弹药数量分布。
功能
弹药架编辑器：自定义各类型弹药在不同弹药架上的分布
机炮供弹支持：调整机炮武器已装填弹链中的弹药组成
膛内弹药选择：选择装填入膛的弹药类型
双语支持：支持英文和中文界面
弹药总量限制选项：限制可编辑弹药总数为打开UI瞬间该载具当前弹药总数（在固定总量下自由分配）
预设配置系统：为每辆载具保存和加载弹药配置

使用方法
进入任意搭载武器的载具
弹药配置窗口会自动弹出一次
使用滑块调整弹药分布：
设置各弹药架上各类型弹药的数量
使用"填满"按钮将弹药架全部填满某一类型弹药
使用"清空"按钮清空该类型弹药
在底部选择膛内弹药类型
点击"应用"保存更改

机炮载具说明
Rack 0 代表供弹接口架上的待发弹药（弹药箱）
机炮载具默认隐藏 Rack 0，因为它不是常规弹药架
可以在"已装填弹药"区域调整弹链组成
已装填弹药总数是固定的，调整某一类型会自动重新平衡其他类型

使用预设配置
配置好想要的弹药分布
在预设文本框中输入名称，点击"保存"保存当前配置
使用下拉框选择之前保存的预设
点击"加载"应用选中的预设
点击"删除"移除选中的预设
预设按载具类型保存在 `UserData/GHPCLoadout/` 目录中。

Description.en-US:
This mod adds selectable fuse behavior to Soviet HE-Frag rounds on multiple tanks and IFVs, addressing the issue where only the T-55’s OF-412 shell has delayed fuse functionality in the base game.  
Historically, many Soviet HE-Frag rounds featured adjustable fuses and removable nose caps, allowing crews to configure the shell for different target types.  
This mod brings that flexibility to more vehicles, making HE-Frag ammunition more realistic and more useful against infantry, fortifications, and lightly armored targets.

By default, compatible HE-Frag rounds receive a \(0.027\) second delay. Players can also switch the shell to an uncapped extra-sensitive mode or a longer delayed fuse mode during gameplay.

How to Use
When an HE-Frag round is loaded, use the following keys to change fuse settings:
- Comma key \([<,]\): remove the nose cap and switch to extra-sensitive fragmentation mode.
- Period key \([>.]\): switch to \(0.063\) second delayed fuse mode.

An empty slot in the ready rack or autoloader carousel is required, since the gun must unload and reload the round to simulate the time needed to adjust the fuse.  
After reloading, press the same key again to revert the setting if needed.  
The bottom-left GUI will show the shell status with one of the following suffixes:

- capped
- uncapped
- delayed

### Supported Vehicles

Full HE-Frag fuse functionality is available for:T-54/55,T-62,T-72 series,T-64,T-80B

The following vehicles can only toggle the nose cap and do not support adjustable fuse delay:BMP-1,PT-76B

### Gameplay Effect
Each fuse setting changes how the shell behaves:
- Uncapped mode is more sensitive and better suited for fragmentation effects against exposed or soft targets.
- Capped mode improves performance against light armor and light cover.
- Delayed mode is useful for firing through obstacles, walls, or into lightly armored vehicles, though it may overpenetrate very light targets and detonate behind them.

### Known Issues
- On the T-62 and T-72, changing fuse settings may still show a spent casing being ejected. This is only a visual issue.
- In X-ray mode (O key), the ready rack or carousel may appear to gain a round during unloading, but the player’s actual ammunition count remains unchanged.
Description.zh-CN:
本模组为多种苏联系坦克与步战车的 HE 破片弹加入了可切换的引信工作模式，修正了原版中仅有 T-55 的 OF-412 具备延期引信效果的问题。
在历史上，这类苏联 HE-Frag 弹通常带有可调引信和可拆卸保护帽，因此可以根据目标类型在不同起爆模式之间切换。
本模组将这一机制扩展到更多车辆，使 HE 破片弹在对付步兵、掩体和轻装甲目标时拥有更真实的表现。
默认情况下，其他适用 HE 破片弹也会获得0.027秒延期效果。玩家还可以在战斗中手动切换为“去帽超敏感”或“长延期”模式，以适应不同战场环境。
使用说明
当 HE 破片弹装填后，可使用以下按键调整引信状态：
逗号键[<,]：拆除保护帽，切换为超敏感“破片”模式。
句号键[>.]：切换为 0.063秒延期引信模式。

切换时需要待发弹架或自动装弹机转盘中有一个空位，因为系统会先将炮弹卸下，再重新装填，以模拟调整引信所需时间。
调整完成后，可再次按对应按键恢复原状态。
界面左下角会显示当前弹药状态后缀：
capped：带帽
uncapped：去帽
delayed：延期

适用载具
完整支持以下载具的 HE 破片弹：T-54/55、T-62、各型 T-72、T-64、T-80B
以下载具仅支持保护帽切换，不支持可调延期引信：BMP-1、PT-76B

效果说明
不同引信模式会显著影响 HE 弹的杀伤方式：
去帽模式更敏感，适合对无遮蔽物或软目标实施破片杀伤。
带帽模式可增强穿过轻型装甲或轻度障碍后的起爆能力。
延期模式适合攻击墙体、工事或部分轻装甲车辆，但对极轻目标时可能发生过穿，在目标后方爆炸。

已知问题
切换引信状态时，T-62 和 T-72 仍可能显示抛出空弹壳，这是纯视觉问题。
开启 X 光模式（O 键）时，可以看到卸弹过程中待发弹架或转盘中多出一发炮弹，但玩家实际弹药总数不会变化。

Description.en-US:
Inspired by a suggestion in the feedback for “Make sight change quicker for e…”, this small mod changes when the fire control system switches the selected ammunition. Instead of updating at the end of the reload sequence, it now switches at the beginning.
This allows you to place the crosshair on target and fire the moment the gun is ready, with no more unexpected ammo changes.
Description.zh-CN:
本模组灵感来自 “Make sight change quicker for e…” 反馈中的一条建议。它对火控系统切换当前弹种的时机进行了一个简单调整：不再在装填流程结束时切换，而是在装填开始时就完成切换。
这样一来，你可以提前将准星对准目标，并在火炮装填完成后立即开火，不会再遇到弹种突然变化的情况。

Description.en-US: This mod allows the player to toggle reticle illumination in the TPN-1 series of night sights, just like the day sights, using the [I] key by default. This will apply to the T-54/55, T-62, T-64 and T-72 variants.
Description.zh-CN: 此模组允许玩家通过默认的 [I] 键，在 TPN-1 系列夜视瞄准镜中切换瞄准点照明功能，其操作方式与日间瞄准镜相同。此功能适用于 T-54/55、T-62、T-64 和 T-72 的各型号。

Description.en-US: Unrestricted Mission Custom menu
Description.zh-CN: 为任务自定义菜单开放所有单位

Description.en-US: Your ammo UI will now show (X+Y+Z), where X is the amount of rounds in your current clip/breech, Y is the amount of rounds in your ready rack, and Z is the amount of rounds you have in storage. This can be useful in determining how much ammo you have in total to work with.
Description.zh-CN: 弹药界面现在将显示 (X+Y+Z)，其中 X 代表当前炮膛内的弹药数量，Y 代表备用弹架中的弹药数量，Z 代表库存中的弹药数量。这有助于判断您总共拥有多少可用弹药。

Description.en-US: GHPC quality-of-life mod that enables restocking without a conscious loader. When the loader is killed or unconsciousness, a penalty is added to the loading time, which by default is 3 seconds per shell to be moved. This value can be customized in the configuration, but cannot be set below 0.
Description.zh-CN: 允许在重伤装填手的情况下进行弹药补给。当装填手阵亡或失去意识时，装填时间会增加惩罚，默认值为每发炮弹 3 秒。该数值可在配置中自定义，但不能设置为低于 0。

Description.en-US: Guaranteed Camo Nets is a mod that ensures camo nets always spawn on supported vehicles and that every available camo net on the vehicle appears correctly. In UserData/MelonLoaderPreferences.cfg, players can choose which vehicles are guaranteed to receive camo nets by setting them to True or False; when set to False, camo nets will never spawn on that vehicle. If a vehicle does not appear in the config file, it usually means that it cannot mount camo nets. If you find a vehicle that can use camo nets but is missing from the config, please report it in Issues.
Description.zh-CN: 本模组可确保伪装网在对应载具上始终生成，并保证该载具所有可用的伪装网都会完整出现。玩家还可以在 UserData/MelonLoaderPreferences.cfg 中将各载具设置为 True 或 False，自由决定哪些载具必定生成伪装网；若设为 False，则该载具将完全不会生成伪装网。若某辆载具未出现在配置文件中，通常表示它无法安装伪装网；如果你发现某辆能够生成伪装网的载具却未被列入配置文件，可前往 Issues 反馈。

Description.en-US:
Features:
Allows users to increase the volume of artillery fire, decrease time it takes for shells to land and increase artillery accuracy.
Allows users to cancel fire missions early by clicking on the associated fire mission button.
Adds in a HUD warning of inbound artillery with randomized voicelines.
Planned Content:
Will allow users to customize artillery and smoke separately.
Known Bugs:
Flares are listed as WP
Description.zh-CN:
允许玩家增加炮火密度、缩短炮弹落点时间并提高炮火精度。
允许玩家通过点击相应的射击任务按钮提前取消射击任务。
在HUD中添加了炮火来袭的警告提示，并附带随机语音提示。
计划内容：
将允许用户分别自定义炮火和烟幕。
已知问题：
照明弹被列为WP白磷烟雾弹

Description.en-US: Random Night Battles in chance.
Description.zh-CN: 随机夜战,概率可调。

Description.en-US: A GHPC mod that disables smoke grenades on all Grafenwöhr missions, including the vehicle showcase, so that you can practice your gunnery or test the game's ballistics simulation without annoying interruptions from the AI.
Description.zh-CN: 这是一个GHPC模组，可以禁用所有射击场任务中的烟雾弹，包括展示，这样你可以练习射击或测试弹道模拟，而不会被AI打扰。

Description.en-US: Loads all vehicle prefabs w/o needing to start a mission
Description.zh-CN: 载具预载支持模块，很多模组都需要此Mod进行预载prefebs，以完成任务初始化。

Description.en-US: Hides the version, controls tooltip, and timescale from the HUD,also has these cfg options (both enabled by default)
Description.zh-CN: 最小化UI是一个轻量级界面优化模组，能隐藏版本号、控件提示和时间缩放显示，并提供默认启用的配置选项，如自定义HUD透明度和按键绑定，方便调整显示偏好。

Description.en-US: ATAC is a mod that lets you choose what vehicles spawn in campaigns, enabling East vs East, NATO vs NATO, T-34s vs M60s and more—configure replacement chances (NEED TO TURN ON Playing Campaign SWITCH)(full unit list on GitHub).
Description.zh-CN: 自定义战役坦克是一款让您自定义战役中载具生成的模组，支持东欧对东欧、NATO对NATO、T-34 对 M60 等任意组合对战，通过配置替换概率（需要先在配置中打开总开关才能生效）（完整单位列表详见 GitHub）。

Description.en-US: GunnerModPC is a lightweight mod enhancing the Gunner, HEAT, PC! experience, adding playable T-34-85 and T-54A vehicles plus helicopter targets (OH-58A, AH-1, Mi-2, Mi-8T, Mi-24, Mi-24V) at Grafenwoehr range, along with live shot damage reports, FPS counter, custom 3rd person crosshair color, and map selector fixes—all toggleable via Mod Manager.
Description.zh-CN: GMPC增强插件是一款增强体验的轻量模组，在Grafenwoehr坦克靶场新增T-34-85、T-54A可玩载具，以及多种直升机靶机（OH-58A、AH-1、Mi-2、Mi-8T、Mi-24、Mi-24V），同时提供实时射击损伤报告、FPS计数器、自定义三视角准星颜色及地图选择修复等实用功能，所有设置可在开关。

Description.en-US: GHPC Cinematic Tools is a cinematic camera tool that supports smooth camera path recording, Depth of Field (DOF) control, easing curves, slow motion, Catmull-Rom spline interpolation and other professional features in F3 freecam mode, plus HTTP API interface and full English/Chinese bilingual support. Simply press F9 to open the menu, F5 to add keyframes, F6 to play paths for easy high-quality gameplay footage creation. Don't install it when you are normally playing.
Description.zh-CN: GHPC电影工具是一款电影镜头工具，支持在 F3 自由摄像模式下录制平滑相机路径、景深控制（DOF）、缓动曲线、慢动作、Catmull-Rom 样条插值等专业功能，还提供 HTTP API 接口和中英双语支持。只需按 F9 打开菜单、F5 添加关键帧、F6 播放路径，即可轻松制作高质量游戏录像。请勿在正常游戏时安装它。

Description.en-US: GunnerModPC Texture Loader is a convenient texture replacement mod that lets you easily swap in-game textures with custom PNG files. Simply place same-named textures in the Gunner, HEAT, PC!\Bin\Mods\GMPCTextureLoader folder, enable auto-refresh in config for real-time previews during scene reloads. Extract originals via CinematicUnityExplorer by searching Texture2D objects and saving as PNG; find more skins on the official Discord.
Description.zh-CN: 贴图更换工具是一款便捷的贴图替换工具模组，让您轻松用自定义 PNG 文件替换游戏内贴图。只需将同名贴图放入 Gunner, HEAT, PC!\Bin\Mods\GMPCTextureLoader 文件夹，配置文件中开启自动刷新功能，即可实时预览修改效果。提取原贴图可通过 CinematicUnityExplorer 工具，搜索 Texture2D 对象后保存为 PNG；此mod并不带有皮肤，各种贴图皮肤请前往官方 Discord 获取。

Name.zh-CN: 苏军红金近卫军徽章替换

Description.en-US:
Soviet Guards Regiment Mod (Version 1.3, 6 April 2026) is a visual replacement mod for Gunner, HEAT, PC that swaps the tactical markings found on Soviet ground vehicles—usually placed on turret cheeks, spotlight covers, or stowage boxes—with the red-and-gold Guards badge awarded to elite “Guards” units. The idea draws on the historical use of these insignia not only during parades and inspections, but also on exercises and maneuvers. If war were to break out suddenly, or under the cover of a training operation, it is easy to imagine these vehicles going into combat before anyone had time to paint the emblems over, carrying their full regalia into battle just as earlier generations might have done. The mod currently affects the BMP-1(P), BMP-2, BRDM-2, BTR-60PB, BTR-70, T-62, all T-64 variants, and the T-80. These changes appear across all missions, including vehicles added through the in-game customizer, and they are also visible in the main menu dioramas. In addition, the mod gives Soviet infantry a proper Guards badge worn on the right breast of the tunic.
After the first launch, the mod generates a MelonPreferences configuration file with several optional settings, including the ability to remove camouflage netting that would otherwise hide the new insignia, disable the console log messages used to report detected and modified vehicles, and individually enable or disable each supported vehicle type and infantry according to personal preference. Known issues currently include insignia remaining visible even after a vehicle has been destroyed and burned out, infantry badges lacking proper specularity because they share the same dull material as vehicle decals, and possible compatibility conflicts with other mods that heavily alter Soviet vehicle components, although Pact Increased Lethality appears to work without major problems.
Description.zh-CN:
Soviet Guards Regiment Mod外观替换模组，它会将苏军地面载具上原本出现于炮塔侧面、探照灯罩或储物箱位置的战术符号，替换为象征“近卫”荣誉称号的红金近卫军徽章。这个设定基于一种很有历史感的想象：近卫部队在阅兵、检阅乃至演习中都会保留这些荣耀标识，而如果战争在演习或高度戒备状态下突然爆发，他们也许根本来不及涂掉徽记，就会像他们的父辈与祖辈一样，带着完整的荣誉标识直接投入战斗。该模组目前会影响 BMP-1(P)、BMP-2、BRDM-2、BTR-60PB、BTR-70、T-62、全部 T-64 变体以及 T-80，并且这些改动会在所有任务中生效，包括通过自定义器添加苏军载具的情况，同时主菜单中的场景展示模型也会同步显示变化。除此之外，模组还为苏军步兵添加了真实样式的近卫军徽章，佩戴位置为制服右胸。
模组在首次运行后会生成 MelonPreferences 配置文件，玩家可以按需启用或关闭多个选项，例如移除可能遮挡徽章的炮塔伪装网、关闭载具识别与修改相关的控制台日志，以及分别控制各类载具和步兵是否启用近卫徽章效果。当前已知问题包括：载具被击毁并烧毁后，徽章不会随之消失或变暗；步兵徽章由于共用载具贴花材质，因此缺乏更真实的金属反光效果；另外，如果与大幅修改苏军载具组件的其他模组同时使用，可能会出现兼容性问题，不过 华约增强模组已确认基本可以正常共存。

Name.en-US: Bocchi the Rock! skin for BTR-70

Description.en-US:
This is a Bocchi the Rock! themed anime camouflage mod for the BTR-70 in Gunner, HEAT, PC!, currently released as version 

Built around all four members of Kessoku Band, the mod gives the vehicle a distinctive anime-inspired camouflage scheme along with custom Cyrillic lettering for “BTR-70” and “Kessoku Band,” creating the feel of a Soviet crew taking their favorite anime band’s colors and decals into battle.

Version serves as the base release and focuses on establishing the core visual identity of the skin. In addition to the main character-themed elements, the mod includes custom decals and supporting art assets designed to blend the look of the vehicle with the aesthetic of Bocchi the Rock! while still keeping the BTR-70 recognizable in-game. More content is planned for future updates, including additional decals, higher-quality graphics, and reticle skins.

Programming for the mod was done by Qwertyryo. Most visual assets are sourced from CloverWorks, the Bocchi Blob on the front hatches was provided by Reddit user u/Chainwalker, and the custom Cyrillic lettering was created by Discord user @megalomantia654. The mod also makes use of source code written by @Bluehawk, whose other Gunner, HEAT, PC! mods are well worth checking out.

At the moment, there are a few known issues. Under freecam thermals, some decals may appear with visible color beneath them, and certain areas of the vehicle still have texturing or mapping imperfections.
Description.zh-CN:
模组以结束乐队四位成员为核心视觉主题，为 BTR-70 装甲车加入了具有鲜明动画风格的迷彩外观，并特别制作了“BTR-70”与“结束乐队”的西里尔字样，使整辆载具呈现出一种“苏系车组成员带着自己最喜欢的动画乐队奔赴战场”的独特设定感。

重点在于完成整体车体外观的主题化改造与视觉统一。除了主要角色相关元素外，模组还包含定制贴花和相关美术处理，力求在保留载具辨识度的同时，尽可能还原《孤独摇滚！》的作品氛围。后续版本还计划继续扩展内容，包括更多额外贴花、更高质量的图像表现，以及瞄具皮肤等附加视觉内容。

本模组由 Qwertyryo 负责程序实现。所使用的素材主要来源于 CloverWorks，前部舱盖上的 Bocchi Blob 图案来自 Reddit 用户 u/Chainwalker，西里尔文字样由 Discord 用户 @megalomantia654 制作。同时，本模组也参考并使用了 @Bluehawk 的相关源代码；如果你也在玩《Gunner, HEAT, PC!》模组，Bluehawk 的作品同样值得关注。

目前已知问题包括：在自由视角热成像模式下，部分贴花会出现带底色显示的情况；此外，载具表面的个别区域仍存在一定的贴图瑕疵或纹理映射问题。
